overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket walking through thick fog along a deserted suburban road, passing construction barriers and approaching abandoned wooden buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy suburban road with construction barriers

events.description: character walks past the road closed sign and continues along the foggy road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy asphalt road toward a road closed barrier

entered.detail: silver metal guardrail running along the right side of the road
orange and white traffic cones blocking the left side of the road
weathered wooden sign reading Road Closed with directional arrow
wooden barrier blocking access to the construction area
leafy trees barely visible through the dense fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy suburban road with a metal guardrail on the right. Orange traffic cones and a Road Closed sign block the left side. Dense fog obscures the trees ahead, creating an eerie, isolated atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: deserted road lined with chain link fences

agents.ego_description: continuing along the foggy road past the construction zone into a more residential area

entered.detail: metal wire fence running along the left side of the road
low concrete barrier replacing the guardrail on the right
wooden electrical poles with wires stretching into the fog

segments.scene_description: Past the construction barriers, the road continues through a foggy residential area with chain link fences on the left and concrete walls on the right. Utility poles line the road stretching into the gray distance.

events.description: character turns slightly left to approach and observe the map board

agents.ego_description: pausing briefly to look at the information board before continuing into the fog

entered.detail: large glass-covered board displaying a map of the area
black directional signs mounted above the information board

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a roadside information board with directional signs, briefly observing it before continuing. The surroundings open up into a more desolate area with fewer trees and visible utility poles.

events.description: character approaches the abandoned flower shop with visible sale signage

agents.ego_description: walking past the abandoned storefront examining the decayed surroundings and debris

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden building with overhanging roof and faded signage
white painted sign reading SALE on the shop front
withered plants hanging in bunches from the shop awning
rectangular wooden boxes with dead plants on the sidewalk
weathered wooden privacy fence alongside the property

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and walks past an abandoned flower shop with a wooden facade, sale signage, and withered hanging plants. The area shows signs of decay with debris scattered on the asphalt, and the character continues past wooden fences into the thick fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate suburban road that transitions from a blocked construction zone into a decaying commercial area shrouded in thick fog. It begins with the character navigating past orange traffic cones and a Road Closed sign beside a metal guardrail, where dense mist obscures the surrounding trees. As the character moves past these barriers, the scene shifts into a residential stretch lined with chain link fences and concrete walls that stretch toward a gray, hazy distance. The camera then passes a roadside information board as the environment opens into a more desolate landscape, before finally approaching an abandoned flower shop with a weathered wooden facade and withered plants. The movement concludes as the character walks past scattered debris and wooden fences, disappearing further into the oppressive fog.
